text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, March 31. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! That's wonderful. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Our Twilio integration is throwing 503 rate limit errors during signups. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Understood. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Went for a run around the neighborhood. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sleep quality is so important. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds critical. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /user/verify under load. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Good focus area. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /user/verify. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! That's good medical feedback. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Looking over our mortgage options. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need scheduling portal immediately. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Good focus area. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
